[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000010 2
1 01101011 5
2 01001111 5
3 10011110 5
4 00100101 3
5 00110001 3
6 01111001 5
7 01001000 2

01 10 00000000 a
12 21 00100011 3
23 32 01001011 4
34 43 00001110 3
45 54 00000100 1
56 65 00100001 2
67 76 00110001 3 match 5
70 07 01001000 2 match 7

02 20 01001000 2 match 7
13 31 00000011 2
24 42 00001010 2
35 53 00000101 2
46 64 00010000 1
57 75 00100001 2
60 06 00000000 a
71 17 00110001 3 match 5

03 30 01001000 2 match 7
14 41 10010010 3
25 52 00100001 2
36 63 00000001 1
47 74 00011000 2
50 05 00000000 a
61 16 00110001 3 match 5
72 27 01101001 4

04 40 00001000 1
15 51 00100001 2
26 62 00100001 2
37 73 01001001 3
